sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ كَامِلٌ إِلَى الْمَطْعَمِ لِيَتَنَاوَلَ الْعَشَاءَ وَحْدَهُ.
sentences.translation: Kamil je otišao u restoran da večera sam.
sentences.translationEn: Kamil went to the restaurant to have dinner alone.

sentences.translation: Sjeo je za sto i otvorio jelovnik.
sentences.translationEn: He sat at the table and opened the menu.

sentences.translation: Naručio je supu, salatu i hljeb.
sentences.translationEn: He ordered soup, salad, and bread.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلَ بِهُدُوءٍ وَنَظَرَ مِنَ النَّافِذَةِ إِلَى الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Jeo je mirno i gledao kroz prozor u ulicu.
sentences.translationEn: He ate calmly and looked through the window at the street.
